title: BRCA Genetic Test: MedlinePlus Medical Test
text:
screening tests . Your provider may recommend that you get tested sooner and more often than usual. 
Taking certain medicines and/or having surgery to reduce the risk of cancer. Surgery may include removing both breasts Â and/or the ovaries and fallopian tubes. Medicines such as tamoxifen and raloxifene can also reduce your cancer risk by controlling the levels of estrogen (a hormone that plays a key role in female reproductive health) in your body.
